{{Quote|Greetings, friends. I see you've been successful in acquiring the shuttle.|Shellar|<ref name="G2">{{GamerCite|2|The Lambda Heist}}</ref>}}
'''Shellar''' owned a [[Shellar's junkyard|junkyard]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], located two miles from [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]]. He was sympathetic to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] and often allowed Rebel operatives to scavenge his junkyard for parts as long as they had the [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] to pay for them.<ref name="G2" />
